name: Driftwave
author: Poki
description: Driftwave is a driving game that puts your steering and drifting skills to the ultimate test across various challenging levels! Set your sights on the destination, choose your direction, transition seamlessly from driving to drifting, and make lightning-fast turns! Drive as fast as you while deftly avoiding obstacles along the way. Pick your favorite car in the garage. How quickly can you drive through all the levels? How to play Driftwave? Swipe forward to start. Click and drag anywhere on the screen while driving to drift. Drag further for more control. Swipe in different directions to make quick turns. Who created Driftwave? Driftwave is created by JamieRowan x RowanFuture. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Driftwave for free? You can play Driftwave for free on Poki. Can I play Driftwave on mobile devices and desktop? Driftwave can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
